name: tubesize
description: View file size data for YouTube videos across different quality levels.

scripts.pack: pnpm run build && rm -rf .release/chrome TubeSize_Extension.zip && mkdir -p .release/chrome/TubeSize_Extension && cp manifest.json popup.html options.html .release/chrome/TubeSize_Extension && cp -R dist icons .release/chrome/TubeSize_Extension && cd .release/chrome && zip -r ../../TubeSize_Extension.zip TubeSize_Extension
scripts.pack:firefox: pnpm run build && rm -rf .release/firefox TubeSize_Firefox_Extension.zip && mkdir -p .release/firefox/TubeSize_Firefox_Extension && cp manifest.firefox.json .release/firefox/TubeSize_Firefox_Extension/manifest.json && cp popup.html options.html .release/firefox/TubeSize_Firefox_Extension && cp -R dist icons .release/firefox/TubeSize_Firefox_Extension && cd .release/firefox && zip -r ../../TubeSize_Firefox_Extension.zip TubeSize_Firefox_Extension

author: Mohamed Sayed
